title: mini project --apply contract
goal: In src/commands/project.ts add applyProject (requires an existing project, else error 'run mini init first'; renders via the shared src/state/projectMd.ts and writes only project.md, never state.json) and a block parser parseProjectContract (labels NAME/WHAT/FOR_WHOM/CONSTRAINTS/APPROACH/NON_GOALS/SUCCESS, modeled on the import-gsd parser; each value runs up to the next known label or EOF). Cover with src/commands/project.test.ts: multi-line bullet sections, empty optional fields, a label-like string inside text. Scope is parser + apply + tests only — no CLI/context/session wiring (those are todo 35/36).

steps.title: parseProjectContract block parser
steps.detail: In new src/commands/project.ts: ParsedProject type (name, what required; forWhom, constraints, approach?, nonGoals?, success?) and a block parser. A known label starts a field only at column 0 (^(NAME|WHAT|FOR_WHOM|CONSTRAINTS|APPROACH|NON_GOALS|SUCCESS):); value runs to next label/EOF, trim, internal newlines kept, lone '-' -> empty; returns null when NAME or WHAT is missing.

steps.title: applyProject writes only project.md
steps.detail: applyProject(parsed, cwd?): exists(cwd) else {ok:false, reason:'no-project'} + error 'run mini init first'; fallbacks forWhom||'(not specified)', constraints||'(none)', optional sections only when non-empty; render via renderProjectMd from projectMd.ts, writeProject; never touches state.json. Returns StepOutcome.

steps.title: Tests: parseProjectContract
steps.detail: src/commands/project.test.ts - multi-line bullet sections (Approach/Non-goals/Success) survive, empty optionals omitted, label-like text NOT at column 0 stays as content, missing NAME/WHAT -> null, lone '-' -> empty.

steps.title: Tests: applyProject
steps.detail: rendered project.md contains the new sections and keeps the '## What I'm building' heading; errors without an existing project; verify state.json is not created/changed.

steps.title: Green: npm test + npm run build
steps.detail: full test suite passes (incl. unchanged init.test.ts/import-gsd.test.ts) and the TypeScript build is clean.
